transcript.text:
[It's been 2 years]
[What happened 2 years ago...]
She just sat
And asked for 5 bowls of udon noodles
I asked, "Who's coming?"
Then asked for skewers, hagfish, ramyun noodles,
And I told her to stop eating
[I saved her life]
Right, and I had to go home
[That's why I'm back]
[It's Tzuyang's 3rd time at this restaurant!]
A simple meal today
I will never push you to eat more
[A crowded place...]
Hello everyone
I'm at Shindaebang station today

There's this place I ate at for a TV show
I think about their skewers and ramyun noodles from time to time
It's been 2 years since
It's right over here!
Right near Shindaebang station
[Shindaebang Station exit #1]
[Nal Eu Neun Dak Ggochi] [Seoul, Gwanak-gu]
[Let's go]
Do you remember me...?
[The owner put up a photo of Tzuyang here]
[Over here]
[From a chat screenshot]
[3rd time visiting]
You don't seem too happy to see me
No! You should've surprised me instead of telling me you were coming
Right, I told him I was coming today

Can I sit over there?
[Enters]
[The skewer menu]
How many skewers for 10,000 Won? (~$8 USD)
Excuse me,
How many skewers for 10,000 Won?
4 of them
So 2,500 per skewer
How many should I eat?
The most was 12
2 middle schoolers ate 12 skewers
So 6 per person?
4 chicken skewers equal to 1 chicken
So 10,000 Won for a whole chicken
2 chicken skewers, 3 ramyun and 3 udon noodles?
Those are the only items I eat here

Excuse me
2 chicken skewers
[Is that really all you're getting this time?]
2 of the 10,000 Won set (So 8 skewers)
3 ramyun noodles and 3 udon noodles That's it for now
She just came in last time and asked for 5 bowls of udon
So I asked, "Who's coming?"
And she said it's all for herself
[That's very strange...]
So I just ended up making 3 bowls for her
And then she proceeded to order other items like skewers and ramyun noodles
I told her to stop
Right, and I had to leave
Thank you
[He'll run out of ingredients...]
It's been a while

Ramyun first Before it gets soggy
It's soaking up the soup
These taste so much better than home-cooked ramyun noodles
These are 2 times better than home-cooked ramyun noodles
It's been a while
Wait, I had it earlier
I never get sick of ramyun
1 bowl down
Even the pickled radish here tastes good
Chicken skewers! It's been a while
It's big and chunky
They have really good skewers
The fresh ones are the best
The sauce is great too
Big meaty pieces
Tender too

Udon
Can't forget about the udon noodles with red chili powder
-Should I turn the fan on? -It's okay
I'm not hot yet
Perfect weather right now to dine outdoors
The soup is all soaked up So let's pour
And continue on the cycle
Amazing
It's going away too quickly
Check this out
The overcooked ones are good because of the smokey flavors
While these are very tender
He usually serves these without the sticks But I asked for the sticks
Let's eat this udon
Eating at a place like this is best on a rainy day
[Not drunk]

I almost made a mess
1 bite of the chicken skewer
The chicken pieces
With udon
I see a lot of people eat udon with beef or chicken toppings like this
So much better This is no joke
Put them in
Tastes so good together
Chicken skewer udon
Eat them together like this
What is this?
[Customers brought her plum juice]
Thank you!
Thank you so much
This is all meant to be
It's not easy to revisit 3 times

It's my first time visiting a place 3 times on camera
Customers ask about this too To check if you really visited 2 times
[Now it's 3 times!]
I came here when I was a rookie streamer
I ended up coming a 3rd time because of the food too
Very nostalgic
The chicken melts in my mouth It just disappears
Pour some soup
A brand new bowl
Chicken with ramyun?
Chicken skewer ramyun
Great idea
[Smiles]
No one has eaten it like that before
[I'll recommend that now]
This is going to be great

It tastes good, but it's better with udon noodles
Maybe because both ramyun and chicken are salty
I think it's because the chicken seasoning goes well with the plain udon flavors
But still delicious
Tender
There's usually a scissor for this tip
Supposed to cut this out
I guess I had 10 bowls of ramyun and udon last time
I only have 6 bowls today
Am I losing it?
Do you remember how much I ate when I first came here?
Like 50,000 something Won
You remember that?
You had udon, ramyun, chicken skewers, hagfish,
Your second visit, this is the posting
Just 10 bowls of ramyun and udon

And I asked why you're only eating 10 bowls
You drank too much the night before
[Can't forget about Tzuyang's hangover]
I remember you because I'm thankful
You know how to drink well too
Right, I was pretty hungover when I visited the 2nd time
So I just had 10 bowls of noodles
Chicken skewer ramyun
There hasn't been anything like this before
[The owner's wife]
I loved seeing you again on TV
We gained so many customers after you gave us a visit
Thank you so much
And you've gotten prettier
Well, you've got younger
I was concerned at first

And they said you're a big eater
But I was still worried
Now I'm okay seeing you eat this much
You're just one of a kind
-Eat a lot slowly -Thank you for the meal
I'm going to add chicken in here too
Udon with chicken is really good
The last one
Cut
On top
So tasty
[Finished]
In 1 bite
Just a simple meal today
Thanks everyone
I just had a simple meal today

Okay I will never push you to eat more
Thank you for the meal [Subtitles by Anthony Hyun Choi] [antchoi91@gmail.com]
